name: Stir-Fried Liver
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the liver thinly and mix with cornstarch and crushed garlic.
2. Brown the liver quickly in hot oil.
3. Add finely-sliced onions and mushrooms to the pan. Stir-fry until the meat is evenly browned.
4. Add chopped scallions and soy sauce, then continue cooking while stirring for 6 to 9 minutes.
